name: veqtor-mcp
description: Local DOCX redline evidence and fail-closed tracked edits for Claude
long_description: Veqtor lets Claude inspect accepted/current Word text, map exact evidence across negotiation rounds, inspect tracked changes, verify quoted wording, preflight a complete edit proposal, create a separate DOCX with real tracked changes, and retain privacy-minimized local provenance. Document processing stays on the user's computer. Veqtor supplies bounded document facts and deterministic writes; it does not provide legal advice or decide whether wording is legally or commercially suitable.

tracked_change_author.title: Tracked-change author
tracked_change_author.description: The name written into new Word tracked changes. Veqtor refuses a blank name or a value longer than 255 characters.

tools.name: list_rounds
tools.description: List DOCX snapshots with byte hashes; ordering is navigation, not verified lineage.

tools.name: extract_redlines
tools.description: Extract supported tracked revisions with hash-bound change-unit anchors.

tools.name: inspect_document
tools.description: Read bounded accepted/current main-body text with hash-bound paragraph references.

tools.name: map_rounds
tools.description: Map exact paragraph evidence and recorded byte derivations without inferring chronology or lineage.

tools.name: verify_quote
tools.description: Verify wording against one hash-bound tracked-change unit.

tools.name: preflight_edits
tools.description: Dry-run an atomic tracked-edit batch and return a source-bound proof.

tools.name: apply_edits
tools.description: Create a separate DOCX from an exact successful preflight proof.

tools.name: export_decision_record
tools.description: Export a privacy-minimized projection of local provenance records.

prompts.name: try_veqtor_demo
prompts.description: Check the connection with four bundled synthetic Word rounds.
prompts.text: Using the Veqtor tools, what happened to the limitation of liability across the four Word rounds in the folder named demo? Start with list_rounds, use inspect_document for a hash-bound paragraph reference, then use map_rounds to compare that evidence across the folder. Keep tool-confirmed document facts separate from your interpretation, and do not treat filename order as verified chronology or lineage.
